name: lucca-front-intellisense
description: Autocomplete, hover and diagnostics for @lucca-front/scss custom properties and pr-u-* utility classes

commands.title: Lucca Front: Reload CSS API manifest

luccaFront.diagnostics.enabled.description: Report deprecated tokens/classes and unknown pr-u-* classes as diagnostics.

luccaFront.diagnostics.deprecatedSeverit.description: Severity for deprecated custom properties and utility classes.

luccaFront.diagnostics.unknownClassSever.description: Severity for pr-u-* classes not present in the installed @lucca-front/scss version.

luccaFront.manifestPath.description: Absolute path to a manifest.json, overriding node_modules discovery (for library development/testing).

luccaFront.experimental.cssDeprecations.markdownDescription: **Experimental.** Flag deprecated custom properties and `pr-u-*` utility classes (diagnostics, hover notices, completion tags). Off by default because deprecation metadata in `@lucca-front/scss` is still incomplete.
